calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-20-2018 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing An Inventory & Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Ferris specially appearing for and with (petitioner) Yi-Hsing Hou.

The Court stated that this is a petition for letters of administration and authorization to administer property but it does not seem that there is any property. Mr. Ferris reported that the petitioner's husband died, that there is no property in California but there is in Florida, that the Florida attorney insists that the property cannot be sold without an Ancillary probate in Florida, that they need exemplified letters from California and suggested that the letters include a termination date. The Court stated that it would set a status on the close of the estate and asked if Mr. Ferris would be representing Ms. Hou. Mr. Ferris stated that he is trying to avoid representation, that payment to him would be based on the statutory fees of the Probate Code but there are no assets, that Ms. Hou will file the necessary status report to close the estate. The Court stated that it is inclined to grant the petition without the IAEA authority. Mr. Ferris stated that he does not know what the Florida Court will want. The Court stated that it does not seem to be necessary since there are no assets here, that it will grant the Petition for Letters of Administration based on the understanding that Mr. Ferris will be involved in helping to terminate the case and that it will grant without IAEA authority. A status on filing an Inventory & Appraisal is set for January 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A status on the close of the estate is set for March 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
